message:
fix(fp-types): clear clippy::approx_constant in scalar_from_primitive_types

scalar_from_primitive_types used 3.14f64 as the float-conversion sample.
clippy::approx_constant denies this as an approximation of
f64::consts::PI. The test only cares that f64 -> Scalar::Float64
round-trips a finite non-zero value, so swap to 1.5f64 (exactly
representable in IEEE-754 binary64, no constant collision).

Net: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings is green
across the workspace (matching the fp-conformance fix in 28e88ce).

[bd-frankenpandas-ocvap]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
